task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the TiddlyWiki Control Panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Control Panel' tiddler (gear icon) is open in the main story river, showing the 'Basics' tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the site title was changed to the target value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' input field in the Control Panel contains exactly 'Meridian UX Research Hub', or this text is prominently displayed at the very top of the right sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the site subtitle was changed to the target value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subtitle' input field in the Control Panel contains exactly 'Research notes and findings for the Meridian Health portal redesign', or this text is visible just below the site title in the right sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the default tiddlers were configured to open the specified project tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default tiddlers' text area in the Control Panel contains 'Project Overview' and 'Research Plan' (often enclosed in double square brackets like [[Project Overview]] [[Research Plan]] or on separate lines).

task_completion.description: Verify the changes were saved to the server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save changes' button (usually a red circle with a checkmark in the sidebar tools), or the save button is grayed out/hidden, indicating there are no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the TiddlyWiki interface in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to modify the server.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements, Console, etc.) are not open during the task.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual TiddlyWiki application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard TiddlyWiki layout (story river on the left, sidebar on the right) is visible, rather than a text editor modifying backend .tid files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target site title is 'Meridian UX Research Hub'. The target site subtitle is 'Research notes and findings for the Meridian Health portal redesign'. The target default tiddlers are 'Project Overview' and 'Research Plan'.
